features.name: dynamic indexed part-select with non-power-of-2 width
features.description: Code should include a dynamic indexed part-select (+:) where the slice width is a non-power-of-2 parameter value, used on a packed array whose total size is the product of two parameters

features.name: clog2 in port width declaration
features.description: Code should include a port declaration using $clog2 of a parameter to compute the selector bit width

features.name: parameterized packed array with product dimension
features.description: Code should include a packed array whose width is computed as the product of two parameters (N*W-1:0)

features.name: mux inferred from indexed part-select of wide array
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment that extracts a variable-width slice from a wide packed array using a dynamic base index, which infers a multiplexer structure
